Disruptive Mood  Dysregulation  Disorder: The Basics How is DMDD diagnosed?  If you think your child may be experiencing symptoms  of DMDD, talk to your child’s health care provider.  Describe your child’s behavior, and report what you  have observed and learned from talking with others,  such as their teacher or counselor. title: أثر اضطراب خلل المزاج التخريبي على الحياة اليومية
